message:
perf(raptorq): hoist buffer allocations out of Gaussian elimination retry loop

Move four per-iteration heap allocations (row_used, pivot_buf, pivot_rhs,
sparse_cols) to before the outer `loop` block in both elimination
functions of InactivationDecoder. On each retry iteration the buffers are
now reused via `.fill()` and `.clear()` instead of being freshly allocated,
which eliminates O(retry_count × n_cols) unnecessary allocations in the
hot path of the RaptorQ inactivation decoder.

Affected functions:
- InactivationDecoder elimination core at line ~2255 (first instance)
- InactivationDecoder elimination core at line ~2515 (second instance)

Both instances apply the identical transformation: declare the four
buffers once before the loop, then reset their contents at the top of
each iteration rather than re-allocating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
